problem_statement:
Given are the two distinct words startWord and targetWord, and a list denoting
    wordList of unique words of equal lengths. Find the length of the shortest transformation sequence from startWord to
    targetWord..

examples.explanation:
The length of the smallest transformation sequence from "der" to 
"dfs" is 3 i.e. "der" -> (replace ГўВҖВҳeГўВҖВҷ by ГўВҖВҳfГўВҖВҷ) -> "dfr" -> (replace ГўВҖВҳrГўВҖВҷ by ГўВҖВҳsГўВҖВҷ)  -> "dfs". So, it takes 3 different strings for us to reach the targetWord. Each of these strings are present in the wordList.

Example 2:

The length of the smallest transformation sequence 
from "gedk" to "geek" is 2 i.e. "gedk" -> (replace ГўВҖВҳdГўВҖВҷ by ГўВҖВҳeГўВҖВҷ) -> "geek" 
So, it takes 2 different strings for us to reach the targetWord. 
Each of these strings are present in the wordList.
